params_frozen.design_provenance: Fresh feature class after 13-test FAIL streak on burnt 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30 holdout (alt_data 6/6, nonlinear 1/1, analyst v10 ABORTED, multi_source 4/4, price_factor 4/4, risk_overlay 1/1; quality+momentum 1/1). Bottleneck identified across diagnostic series: features were the constraint, not architecture. Options-implied is genuinely new feature space, sourced from iVolatility $399 retail tier (probe v5 PASS 99.5% T1 retention, PIT replication probe PASS Pearson 0.9990).
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: zen + perplexity 2026-05-01: PIT integrity showstopper RESOLVED via rolling-replication probe (AAPL n=12 monthly asofs 2023, Pearson 0.9990 ≥ 0.95 gate). Hypothesis direction COMMITTED ex-ante per Xing-Zhang-Zhao 2010 / Bali-Hovakimian 2009 / An-Ang-Bali-Cakici 2014 NEGATIVE-sign convergence. Lasso multicollinearity addressed via stack reduction to 4 orthogonal-by-construct options features (drop IVR/IVX60/IVX90/HVP/skew). Long-only power loss vs L/S benchmark (Quantpedia, Blitz et al. 2019) mitigated by L/S decile-spread diagnostic alongside primary. m=30 vs m=14 reconciled — naive primary, Romano-Wolf stretch.
params_frozen.data_endpoint_primary: /equities/stock-market-data (smd) — single-call returns 100+ pre-computed features per (ticker, asof). Probe v5 99.5% T1 retention with original ticker indexing preserved across delistings (T2=0). Probe v5 file: scripts/probe_ivolatility_options_survivorship_v2.py.
params_frozen.pit_integrity_evidence: scripts/probe_pit_replication.py + 25 unit tests in tests/test_probe_pit_replication.py. AAPL n=12 monthly asofs 2023, empirical IVP recomputed from raw IVX30 backward [t-365d, t) window matches vendor smd IVP within ~1 percentile point on 8/8 valid pairs (4 NaN are weekend/holiday calendar artifacts, production fix: snap-to-trading-day). Pearson 0.9990 ≥ 0.95 gate. Vendor smd uses strict backward-looking 1y rolling window. Verdict artefact: docs/research/pit_replication_probe_2026_05_01.md.
feature_stack_options: IVP30 — 1y rolling percentile of IVX30 (rank-based, robust to vol outliers)
feature_stack_equity_controls: reversal_1m — −1 × r_21d from Polygon stock aggs
momentum_6m — r_[t-126, t-21] skip-month per Jegadeesh-Titman
rv_30d — annualized stdev log returns last 30 days
feature_stack_dropped_from_v2_draft: IVR (redundant with IVP — same construct, less robust)
25Δ skew (would require /ivs per-strike interpolation × 2000 tickers × 2000 dates — infeasible at retail tier; deferred to v8)
P/C OI ratio (smd aggregate includes LEAPS+OTM dilutes signal; deferred to v7.1 via stock-opts-by-param 20-45 DTE × delta [0.25, 0.75])
vendor BETA10D-180D (Carhart-style equity controls 1-3 already provide market exposure adjustment)

universe_construction.optionable_filter: DYNAMIC per zen — smd `optVol > 0 OR (openInterest_call + openInterest_put) > 0` on t-1. NOT Polygon /v3/reference/options/contracts as_of= metadata (survivorship-revision risk).

delisting_handling.rule: forward-fill last trading price 5 trading days post-delisting (settlement / OTC residual), then apply −50% return for standard delistings (acquisition, voluntary), −100% for bankruptcy (Ch11, FDIC receivership)

params_frozen.model_regularization: L1 with alpha selected via CV on train window only
params_frozen.fit_strategy: single global model fitted on 7-feature stack (4 options + 3 equity controls) across train tranches

target_definition.transformation: raw (no rank-target unless empirically justified post-Phase-A)

params_frozen.selection_primary: long-only BOTTOM decile EW by Lasso-fitted score (NEGATIVE-sign hypothesis: high-IV/skew names underperform per Xing 2010, so bottom-by-Lasso = top-by-expected-return for going long)
params_frozen.selection_diagnostic_secondary: L/S decile spread (long bottom − short top) reported alongside primary. NOT primary verdict, NOT additional Bonferroni test. Power-loss diagnostic only — if L/S PASS but long-only FAIL, indicates constraint-driven power loss not absence of alpha.
params_frozen.selection_implementation: BacktestEngine(top_n=N, bottom_n=N) with v7 scorer multiplying Lasso-fitted score by -1 (so bottom-by-Lasso = top-by-score in engine top_n path; engine's bottom_n exposes original top-by-Lasso for L/S short leg).
params_frozen.cost_rationale: 30bps RT = 15bps half-spread + 5bps adverse selection × 2 (long-only single-leg). For L/S diagnostic caller applies CostModel.from_profile('long_only_30bps') separately to each leg (60bps total RT). Profile codified in alphalens/attribution/cost_model.py:_PROFILE_BPS, parity tests in tests/test_cost_model_v7_parity.py.
params_frozen.benchmark: MDY (SPDR S&P MidCap 400 ETF, cap-matched mid-cap). Lesson from alt_data v5/v6a: SPY mega-cap rally explained ~58% of v5's catastrophic gap; MDY eliminates that confound for non-mega-cap-tilted strategies.

phase_audit.dispersion_metric: excess_net_ann (after-cost economic reality, NOT alpha_t — alpha_t already protected by Bonferroni)

phase_a_gates.feature_joiner_coverage_metric: non-NaN feature rows / (universe × asofs) on train window
phase_a_gates.holdout_sample_size_rationale: Mirror multi_source_two_stage Phase A floor (~5k was minimum-viable; 50k is comfortable for 7-feature Lasso across 2y holdout × ~2000 tickers × stride-5 = ~200k expected).
phase_a_gates.multicollinearity_action: If any pair >0.85 → reduce to one feature (drop the more-derived one) BEFORE Phase B. Deviation from this triggers re-review.

periods.rationale: Train 6y matches multi_source convention. Holdout BURNT (14 prior tests on this window). iVolatility smd has 2000+ history; Polygon stock aggs cover this range. Probe v5 verified retention across this period.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (long-only-bottom-decile-return − MDY-return) holdout series
success_criteria.primary_pass_rule: Holdout Carhart-4F αt ≥ 2.86 AND phase dispersion <50pp on excess_net_ann AND ≥1 Lasso nonzero coef on options features (NOT all zero — selection-mechanism artifact gate) AND in-CV mean rank-IR ≥ 0.5

verdict_classification.robust_pass: primary PASS + stretch PASS → 'PASS robust to conservative multiplicity; advance to fresh-OOS prospective replication 2026-05-02+'
verdict_classification.primary_pass_only: primary PASS + stretch FAIL → 'PASS borderline; flagged for prospective replication, capital deploy OFF-TABLE pending'
verdict_classification.fail: any primary gate FAIL → standard FAIL ledger entry, increment program count to n=15, next test |αt|≥2.95 naive Bonferroni

auto_pivot_triggers: PIT replication probe Pearson <0.95 → ABORT (RESOLVED 2026-05-01: 0.9990 PASS)
Phase A feature coverage <70% → ABORT pre-Phase-B
Phase A multicollinearity max pairwise |corr| >0.85 → consolidate stack, document deviation
Phase B Lasso zero-coefs all 4 options features → FAIL (selection-mechanism artifact, mirrors v2 alt_data degenerate case)
Lasso flips sign vs literature prior across phases → diagnostic flag, no auto-pass; document in verdict memo
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report holdout αt and excess vs MDY split by VIX>20 vs VIX<20 sub-periods. If alpha lives only in high-VIX regime, document as 'tail-risk premium, regime-dependent' rather than systematic alpha.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of any verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
success_criteria.fail_rule: anything not clearing primary → FAIL, log to ledger
